texto: Your youth is the most important thing you will ever have. It's when you will connect to music like a primal urge, and the memories attached to the songs will never leave you. Please hold on to everything. Keep every note, mix tape, concert ticket stub, and memory you have of music from your youth. It'll be the one thing that might keep you young, even if you aren't anymore.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Butch Walker: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Your youth is the most important thing you will ever have. It's when you will connect to music li…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, music, youth pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
